hero.imageAlt: Bright cottage bedroom with twin beds, natural linens, and garden light through the windows
hero.title: Mariposa Cottage

intro.heading: Elegant space for two.
paragraphs: Elegant and spacious, Mariposa Cottage offers a calm retreat with two twin beds and an en-suite bathroom with shower—ideal for friends, family, or anyone who prefers separate beds after a day in the hills.

sideImage.alt: Twin beds with white bedding and soft morning light in a tropical cottage

highlights.title: Two twin beds
highlights.description: Spacious layout with comfortable twin beds and quality linens.

highlights.title: En-suite shower
highlights.description: Private bathroom with shower, steps from your room.

highlights.title: Room to breathe
highlights.description: Generous floor plan with an unhurried, restful feel.

booking.title: Reserve Mariposa Cottage
booking.description: Reconnect with the rhythm of nature. Our concierge is ready to tailor your journey from the moment of inquiry.
